description: Create a complete emergency towing exercise scenario for Bridge Command set in the English Channel East environment. The scenario must be located at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) Dover Strait ETV Exercise/' and include environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini. Configure the environment for a winter morning (Nov-Feb, 09:00-11:00) with rough weather (Wind Force 5-6, Visibility >= 5.0nm). Set the ownship as 'ETV Anglian Monarch' positioned 2-3 nautical miles from the disabled vessel, approaching at 12-14 knots. The othership configuration must include at least five vessels: 'MV Pacific Endurance' (Large vessel) drifting near 51.05N, 1.35E at < 1.0 kn with a heading consistent with beam-on drift, a Coastguard vessel standing by at < 6kn, and three commercial vessels transiting TSS lanes at > 10kn with appropriate waypoints. Update bc5.ini to enable ARPA and Full Radar with a max range of 72nm and range resolution of 256. Additionally, author an 'Emergency Towing Procedure' document (minimum 800 words) at '/home/ga/Documents/emergency_towing_procedure.txt' covering the communication plan (VHF Ch 16/67), approach plan (weather/lee side), connection sequence (messenger, pennant, wire), and referencing IMO Resolution A.535(13).
